meta.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band pain, shin splints, or Achilles trouble? Our running-focused PTs in Seneca, SC get you back to pain-free miles. Claim your $97 eval.

offer.headline: $97 Comprehensive Evaluation
offer.detail: A 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy — normally $250.

index.title: Trampis PT — Run Pain-Free Again | Seneca, SC
index.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band pain, shin splints, or Achilles trouble? Our running-focused PTs in Seneca get you back to pain-free miles. Claim your $97 eval.

blocks.eyebrow: Seneca, SC · For runners who refuse to stop running
blocks.headline: Get back to running — and hit your goals — without pain or fear of re-injury
blocks.subhead: Runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, Achilles, plantar fasciitis. We find what's really driving your pain and build a smart return-to-run plan around the miles you want to run.

blocks.headline: Is pain stealing your miles?
blocks.body: You don't have to settle for shorter runs or sitting out your next race. If any of this sounds like you, you're exactly who we built this for:
items: The pain flares up the second your mileage starts to climb
You've been told to 'just rest' — but it always comes back when you run again
Generic stretches and new shoes haven't fixed the real problem
You're starting to wonder if your goal race is even realistic

blocks.headline: If that sounds like your training right now, we can help.
blocks.body: There's a reason the pain keeps coming back — and a clear path to running through it.

blocks.headline: Every week you wait, the goal slips further away

items.title: Losing your fitness
items.body: Time off doesn't just hurt — it erodes the endurance and base you spent months building. Every layoff sets you back.

items.title: Stuck in the flare-up cycle
items.body: Rest a week, run, hurt again. The pattern never breaks because nobody fixed what's actually causing it.

items.title: Watching the calendar
items.body: Race day isn't moving. The longer this drags on, the smaller your window to train and toe the line healthy.

blocks.headline: Why runners choose Trampis PT
blocks.intro: We're not a hot-pack-and-handout clinic. We're runners who treat runners — we find the root cause, fix your mechanics, and get you back on the road for good.

items.title: Full running gait analysis
items.body: A 90-minute, head-to-toe evaluation with video gait analysis that reveals the real driver of your pain — not just where it hurts.

items.title: A plan built for your goals
items.body: One-on-one care mapped to your weekly mileage, your race date, and how your body responds — not a generic protocol.

items.title: A smart return-to-run
items.body: We rebuild your strength and mechanics and progress your mileage the right way, so the pain stays gone and you come back stronger.

blocks.headline: Ready to find out what's really stopping your stride?
blocks.body: Your $97 eval includes a full 90-minute one-on-one assessment and gait analysis with a Doctor of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Claim your $97 evaluation
steps.body: Book your 90-minute running assessment online in under a minute. No referral needed.

steps.title: Get a real diagnosis & gait analysis
steps.body: We pinpoint the root cause everyone else missed and map out exactly how we'll fix it.

steps.title: Get back to running — for good
steps.body: Follow a smart return-to-run plan with a coach in your corner and hit your mileage and race goals without fear of re-injury.

blocks.headline: Your next PR starts with one call.
blocks.body: Spots for the $97 running evaluation are limited each week. Claim yours before they're gone.

blocks.headline: Claim your $97 evaluation
blocks.intro: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch to lock in your 90-minute assessment.
